name: reset_drc
full_help:
reset_drc

Description: 
Remove DRC report

Syntax: 
reset_drc  [-name <arg>] [-quiet] [-verbose]

Usage: 
  Name        Description
  -----------------------
  [-name]     DRC result name
  [-quiet]    Ignore command errors
  [-verbose]  Suspend message limits during command execution

Categories: 
DRC, Report

arguments.description: Suspend message limits during command execution
